# Strategic Brief Template

Use this artifact to hand strategic intent from `pstack` into an execution system such as `OMX`.

## Problem

What was requested or observed?

## Actual Problem

What is the problem behind the brief?

## Chosen Bet

What path are we choosing?

## Key Assumption

What must be true for this bet to pay off?

## Kill List

What options are explicitly out, and why?

## Scope Box

What is in scope for this execution cycle?

What is out of scope?

## Definition of Done

What concrete outcome will prove the bet?

## Constraints

What external limits shape execution?

## Review Point

When will we revisit the bet?

What evidence would trigger reassessment?
